OmniIntegrationProcedure.customJavaScript: {"context":{"projectDescription":"We are seeking grant funding for robotics equipment and teacher training."},"projectDescription":"We are seeking grant funding for robotics equipment and teacher training."}
OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Return matching funding opportunities based on the project description.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GrantIntakeAnalyzeProject

omniProcessElements.name: FundingOpportunitySearch
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "failOnStepError" : true, "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "ignoreCache" : true, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "fundingSearch", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "useFormulas" : true, "restOptions" : { }, "bundle" : "DRXFundingOpportunitySearch", "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.description: Build baseline assessment from the project description and search results.
omniProcessElements.name: NormalizeAiResponse
Response
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "elementValueMap" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "isActive" : true, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "additionalOutput" : { "analysisSuccess" : "=true", "analysisErrorMessage" : null, "searchText" : "=%TransformInput:searchText%", "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%", "fundingOpportunityTableRows" : "=%fundingSearch%", "filteredFundingOpportunities" : "=[]", "topFundingOpportunities" : "=[]", "initialAiAssessment" : { "projectDescription" : "=%initialAiAssessment:projectDescription%", "aiSummary" : "=%initialAiAssessment:aiSummary%", "confidenceScore" : "=%initialAiAssessment:confidenceScore%", "keywords" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:keywords%),[],%initialAiAssessment:keywords%)", "recommendedFundingTypes" : "=IF(ISBLANK(%initialAiAssessment:recommendedFundingTypes%),[],%initialAiAssessment:recommendedFundingTypes%)", "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%" }, "context" : { "projectDescription" : "=%TransformInput:searchText%", "analysisSuccess" : "=true", "analysisErrorMessage" : null, "fundingOpportunities" : "=%fundingSearch%" } }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }
